title: Web Attack Geographic Anomaly (Rare Country Detection)
description: Identifies attack traffic originating from unusual countries by stacking WAF events by country code. Rare countries with high attack volumes may indicate targeted campaigns from specific threat actor regions.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and 'Action' = 'BLOCK' | stats count as attacks, unique('Client IP') as unique_ips by 'Country Code' | sort -attacks | where attacks > 5
falsepositives: VPN traffic from unusual exit nodes
